headline: Ladenburg Thalmann Maintains Buy on BXP, Raises Price Target to $80
summary: Ladenburg Thalmann  analyst Floris Van Dijkum   maintains BXP (NYSE:BXP) with a Buy and raises the price target from $70 to $80.

raw.headline: Ladenburg Thalmann Maintains Buy on BXP, Raises Price Target to $80

headline: Can BXP (BXP) Justify Its Valuation On The Boston Dynamics Lease?
summary: Boston Dynamics lease puts BXP’s Urban Edge campus in focus BXP (BXP) has secured a long term lease with Boston Dynamics for about 320,000 square feet at Reservoir Place in Waltham, one of Greater Boston’s largest innovation focused office deals this year. For investors, the announcement is drawing attention to how a single anchor tenant can influence expectations for occupancy, cash flow visibility and perceived risk in a real estate investment trust focused on gateway office markets. See...
